name: upload_document
description: Upload a document file to an existing Smartcat translation project. The document will be parsed and segmented for translation according to the project's workflow. Supported formats include XLIFF, DOCX, XLSX, PPTX, HTML, JSON, XML, PO, RESX, CSV, TXT, SRT, and many more. The file is sent as multipart/form-data.

parameters.name: projectId
parameters.description: The ID of the project to upload the document to. Passed as a query parameter.

parameters.name: file
parameters.description: The document file to upload. Sent as multipart/form-data. The filename determines the file format.

parameters.name: disassembleAlgorithmName
parameters.description: File parsing algorithm override. Usually auto-detected from the file extension. Examples: 'xliff', 'json', 'html'.

parameters.name: targetLanguages
parameters.description: Override target languages for this specific document. If omitted, uses the project's target languages.

body._note: Send file as multipart/form-data with field name 'file'
